proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` is associated with longer `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` increases mean progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS gave a coefficient of +0.170 months per 1-unit increase in feature_041 (SE 0.0007, r=0.757; p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_041` was the dominant continuous association, so the next iteration checked whether the effect was also visible as a clinically interpretable high-versus-low contrast.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the top quartile of `feature_041` (>=71.8) have longer `pfs_months` than patients in the bottom quartile of `feature_041` (<=58.3).

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile feature_041 patients had mean PFS 5.669 months versus 1.329 months in the bottom quartile, a +4.340 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: The large high-versus-low separation supported prioritizing other large main effects.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal values of `feature_036` are associated with shorter `pfs_months`, with level 2 lower than level 1 and level 1 lower than level 0.

analyses.result_summary: Treating feature_036 as ordinal, OLS estimated -1.099 months per level (p<1e-300). Level means were 4.327 for 0, 3.185 for 1, and 2.152 for 2.

iterations.update: `feature_036` showed a strong graded adverse pattern, motivating tests of other binary adverse markers.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_001=1` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_001=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.925 months for feature_001=1 versus 4.362 months for feature_001=0, a -1.438 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_001` was another strong adverse marker; I next checked another common binary marker.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_042=1` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_042=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.743 months for feature_042=1 versus 3.663 months for feature_042=0, a -0.921 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: The next iteration evaluated the named categorical tumor feature.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_015=squamous` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_015=adenocarcinoma`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.813 months for squamous versus 3.670 months for adenocarcinoma; the squamous contrast was -0.857 months (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_015` behaved like an adverse histology-like subgroup, so the next step examined the other string-coded feature.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_025=current` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than the other `feature_025` levels.
`feature_025=never` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than the other `feature_025` levels.

analyses.result_summary: The current level had mean PFS 2.987 months and was -0.634 months lower than non-current patients (p<1e-300).
The never level had mean PFS 3.675 months and was +0.286 months higher than all other patients in the univariate indicator model (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: The current level was clearly adverse; the apparent never-level advantage needed adjustment because it could reflect other favorable features.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_004` is associated with shorter `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_004` lowers mean progression-free survival.
Patients in the top quartile of `feature_004` (>=6.4) have shorter `pfs_months` than patients in the bottom quartile of `feature_004` (=0).

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated -0.0733 months per 1-unit increase in feature_004 (p<1e-300).
Top-quartile feature_004 patients averaged 3.036 months versus 3.727 months in the bottom quartile, a -0.691 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: The inverse feature_004 pattern was consistent across linear and quartile analyses.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_010=1` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 4.114 months for feature_010=1 versus 3.332 months for feature_010=0, a +0.782 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_010` was a favorable binary marker, so I looked for other favorable continuous patterns.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_056` is associated with longer `pfs_months`.
Patients in the top quartile of `feature_056` (>=4.1) have longer `pfs_months` than those in the bottom quartile (<=3.5).

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated +0.441 months per 1-unit increase in feature_056 (p<1e-300).
Top-quartile feature_056 patients averaged 3.686 months versus 3.180 months in the bottom quartile, a +0.505 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: After identifying major main effects, I checked whether a rare adverse-looking marker remained important.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057=1` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_057=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.661 months for feature_057=1 versus 3.472 months for feature_057=0, a -0.810 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: The univariate feature_057 signal was strong, but it needed multivariable adjustment because it might be confounded.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for `feature_041`, `feature_036`, `feature_001`, `feature_042`, `feature_015`, `feature_025`, `feature_004`, `feature_010`, `feature_056`, `feature_009`, `feature_037`, `feature_028`, `feature_066`, `feature_051`, and `feature_073`, `feature_057=1` remains associated with shorter `pfs_months`.
After the same adjustment, `feature_025=current` remains associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_025=former`.
After the same adjustment, `feature_025=never` remains associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_025=former`.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted model, feature_057 had coefficient -0.0278 months (SE 0.0152, p=0.0684), so the independent adverse effect was not significant.
In the adjusted model, feature_025=current remained lower than former by -0.552 months (p<1e-300).
In the adjusted model, feature_025=never was not different from former: -0.0056 months (p=0.607).

iterations.update: Adjustment preserved the current-level disadvantage but removed the never-level advantage and attenuated feature_057.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_009=1` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_009=0`.
`feature_037=1` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_037=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Feature_009=1 had mean PFS 3.641 months versus 3.319 months for 0, a +0.322 month difference (p<1e-300).
Feature_037=1 had mean PFS 3.319 months versus 3.523 months for 0, a -0.204 month difference (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_009` and `feature_037` both had main effects and were candidates for interaction testing.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_028=1` is independently associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment for the major predictors.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted feature_028=1 was -0.190 months lower (p<1e-300), but in the adjusted model the coefficient was -0.0053 months (p=0.481), not significant.

iterations.update: `feature_028` looked confounded, so I separated robust signals from interaction-driven patterns.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_066=1` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_066=0`, but this association is not independent of the major predictors.

analyses.result_summary: Feature_066=1 was +0.189 months higher in unadjusted subgroup means (p=1.90e-10).
After adjustment for the major predictors, feature_066 had coefficient -0.0005 months (p=0.963), so the unadjusted association was not independent.

iterations.update: `feature_066` was another apparent univariate signal that disappeared after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combination `feature_010=1` and `feature_009=1` has supra-additively longer `pfs_months` beyond the separate main effects of `feature_010` and `feature_009`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_010-by-feature_009 interaction was +2.558 months (p<1e-300). Cell means were 3.334 (0:0), 3.329 (0:1), 3.213 (1:0), and 5.766 (1:1).

iterations.update: This was the strongest interaction, indicating a subgroup with much longer PFS when both markers were present.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037=1` weakens the positive association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_010-by-feature_037 interaction was -1.694 months (p<1e-300). Feature_010=1 had high mean PFS when feature_037=0 (4.870 months) but not when feature_037=1 (3.186 months).

iterations.update: `feature_037` appeared to block a favorable feature_010 subgroup pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037=1` weakens the positive association between `feature_009=1` and `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_009-by-feature_037 interaction was -0.562 months (p<1e-300). Feature_009=1 averaged 3.892 months when feature_037=0 but 3.324 months when feature_037=1.

iterations.update: `feature_037` also modified feature_009, so I checked whether feature_057 acted similarly.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057=1` weakens the positive association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_010-by-feature_057 interaction was -1.210 months (p=4.44e-16). The feature_010=1/feature_057=1 cell averaged only 2.316 months.

iterations.update: `feature_057` had little independent adjusted main effect but had clear interaction behavior.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057=1` weakens or reverses the positive association between `feature_009=1` and `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_057-by-feature_009 interaction was -0.488 months (p=4.12e-7). Feature_009=1 was favorable when feature_057=0 but not when feature_057=1.

iterations.update: The interaction results suggested subgroup heterogeneity rather than one uniform feature_057 main effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher levels of `feature_036`.

analyses.result_summary: In an OLS model with feature_041, feature_036, and their product, the raw interaction coefficient was -0.01472 months per feature_041 unit per feature_036 level (p<1e-300).

iterations.update: `feature_036` not only had a negative main effect but also reduced the benefit associated with higher feature_041.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker in the adverse subgroups `feature_001=1`, `feature_015=squamous`, and `feature_042=1`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_041-by-feature_001 interaction was -0.01265 months per feature_041 unit (p<1e-300).
The feature_041-by-squamous interaction was -0.01180 months per feature_041 unit (p<1e-300).
The feature_041-by-feature_042 interaction was -0.01138 months per feature_041 unit (p=4.66e-15).

iterations.update: Several adverse subgroups had both lower PFS and a weaker feature_041 slope.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is stronger when `feature_010=1` or when `feature_056` is higher.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_041-by-feature_010 interaction was +0.00696 months per feature_041 unit (p=0.000268).
The feature_041-by-feature_056 interaction was +0.00381 months per feature_041-by-feature_056 unit (p=0.00314).

iterations.update: Favorable markers modestly amplified the feature_041 association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_051` has an independent negative association with `pfs_months`, but the effect size is very small.
`feature_073` has an independent positive linear association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.000446 months per 1-unit increase in feature_051 (p<1e-300), statistically significant but very small in magnitude.
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.000098 months per 1-unit increase in feature_073 (p=0.408), not significant.

iterations.update: Most secondary continuous variables had negligible effects compared with the leading features.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Rare `feature_033=1` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_033=0`.
`feature_029=1` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` than `feature_029=0`.
`feature_005=1` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `feature_005=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Feature_033=1 had a +0.200 month unadjusted difference, but this did not reach 0.05 significance (p=0.0538).
Feature_029=1 had a -0.119 month unadjusted difference (p=0.0413), a weak nominal signal.
Feature_005=1 had a +0.097 month unadjusted difference (p=0.0197), also a weak nominal signal.

iterations.update: The iteration cap was reached after probing leading main effects, adjusted effects, subgroup contrasts, interactions, and weak sparse-feature signals.
